eligibility: The applicant must be over 18 years of age. The applicant must hold a savings or current account with an Indian or multinational bank in India. The applicant must have a good credit history with no payment defaults. The applicant must have a personal annual income of ₹6 lakhs or above (for both salaried and self-employed individuals). The applicant must have a current/permanent residential address in India. If self-employed, the applicants company must have been trading for more than 12 months. The applicant and/or supplementary card applicant(s) must be Resident Indian(s) as defined under the Income Tax Act of India, and must notify American Express Banking Corp. in case of a change in residential status. American Express Cards are currently issued only to residents of the following cities (subject to conditions): Delhi/NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Kolkata, Indore, Coimbatore, Chandigarh/Tricity, Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodara, Lucknow, Ludhiana, Nagpur, Nasik, Trivandrum, and Mysuru.

eligibility: The applicant and/or supplementary card applicant(s) must be Resident Indian(s) as defined under the Income Tax Act of India, and must notify American Express Banking Corp. in case of any change in residential status. American Express Cards are currently issued only to residents of the following cities (subject to conditions): Delhi/NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Indore, Coimbatore, Chandigarh, Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodara, Lucknow, Ludhiana, Nagpur, Nasik, Trivandrum, and Mysuru. The applicant must be employed with a personal annual income of INR 4.5 lakhs and above, or self-employed with a personal annual income of INR 6 lakhs and above. The applicant must hold a savings or current account with an Indian or multinational bank in India. The applicant must have a current/permanent residential address in India. The applicant must be over 18 years of age. The applicant must have a good credit history with no payment defaults. If self-employed, the applicants company must have been trading for more than 12 months.
